summary: A re-posted Tampa Bay 28 (WFTS) local TV news human-interest segment about HSI special agent Justin Gaertner, a Marine veteran who lost both legs in Afghanistan and now rescues child exploitation victims using digital forensics. Despite the recruitment tag, it is a reporter-narrated news package with anchor desk and interview footage, not a produced music-driven recruitment trailer.
notable_text: On-screen: 'MARINE VET USES DIGITAL SKILLS TO RESCUE CHILD EXPLOITATION VICTIMS' / 'TAMPA BAY 28'.
